heading: Programs authorized
label: 3992 Programs authorized
notes: References in TextThis part, referred to in subsec. (b), was in the original “this chapter” and was translated as reading “this part” to reflect the probable intent of Congress because title III of , which comprises this subchapter, does not contain chapters.Pub. L. 98–377

children.heading: Grants
children.label: a Grants
children.text: The Secretary may make grants to States to pay the Federal share of the cost of the programs described in .section 3994 of this title

children.heading: Authorization of appropriations
children.label: b Authorization of appropriations
children.text: There are authorized to be appropriated for purposes of carrying out this part $20,000,000 for fiscal year 1988.1See References in Text note below.1
